name: last30days-cxd
description: CxD fork of last30days. Researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Hacker News, Polymarket, GitHub, and 5+ more sources. Writes a 2-3 paragraph synopsis plus bullet-point breakdown to ~/01.Business.CxD/Research/Last30days/; chat shows only the saved file path.
